# 🏛️ Governance / Compliance Pull Request

## Related Issue
- Link the issue(s) this PR addresses:
  Closes #<issue_number>

## Description
- What governance, policy, or compliance change is being introduced?
- Why is this change required?
- Which rules, standards, or regulations does it affect?

## Changes

### Policy / Governance Changes
- Rule / standard change 1
- Rule / standard change 2

### Code / Configuration Changes
- Changes enforcing governance rules:
  - ...

### Dependencies
- Added / Updated / Removed (if any)

### Scope Impact
- Affected areas:
  - Core
  - Runtime
  - Adapter
  - Capability
  - Documentation

## Validation

### Compliance Check
- [ ] Aligns with FireHub architecture standards
- [ ] Follows coding / security / design rules
- [ ] No violations of existing policies

### Verification
- [ ] Manually reviewed
- [ ] System behavior validated (if applicable)
- [ ] CI checks pass

- Risk level:
  - [ ] None
  - [ ] Low
  - [ ] Medium
  - [ ] High

- Potential rule conflicts:
  - ...
- Migration risks:
  - ...

### Enforcement Impact
- What becomes stricter or enforced:
  - ...

## Documentation
- [ ] Governance documentation updated
- [ ] Changelog updated
- [ ] Policy references updated
- [ ] Internal standards updated

## Checklist

- [ ] Governance change clearly defined
- [ ] Impact on ecosystem understood
- [ ] No unintended breaking changes
